effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks, if your opponent has no front row rear-guards, this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: The tyrant of burnt fields leaves no survivor.

effectEN: Choose one of your vanguards, and until end of turn, it gets "[AUTO](VC):When your opponent's rear-guard is retired during your main phase, you draw a card.".
flavorTextEN: Corner the enemy, bring them down, and efficiently raise accolades.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose an Arms card from your drop, and put it into your hand.
flavorTextEN: To be added.

effectEN:
Play this with COST  [Counter Blast (2)]!
Choose two Arms cards from your drop, and put them into your hand.
flavorTextEN: This is the spirit treasure of prayers. It grants only hope or despair.

effectEN:
Right Deity Arms - "Sealed Blaze Maiden, Bavsargra" (After being played, the specified vanguard Arms it. If a new Right Deity Arms is Armed, put this card into the drop)
Play this with COST  [Counter Blast (1)]!
[AUTO](VC):When this card is Armed, draw a card, and you may play an additional Arms card this turn.
[CONT](VC):During your turn, the unit Armed with this card gets [Power]+10000.
flavorTextEN: Put on the flames, the symbol of determination.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), if one Arms is on your (VC), COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose an Arms card from your hand or drop, and arm it to one of your vanguards.
[CONT](RC):During your turn, if two Arms are on your (VC), this unit gets [Power]+5000.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose an Arms card from your drop, and put it into your hand.
flavorTextEN: What we found was but a portion of the sealed power.

effectEN: If your vanguard is "Dragonic Overlord", choose one of your units, and it gets [Power]+20000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [CONT]:The normal ride from hand on this unit by a unit with different card name is regarded as persona ride too.
flavorTextEN: Well versed in all martial arts, a battle hardened warrior.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose a grade 0 card from your drop, call it to (RC) in the same column as this unit, and this unit gets "Boost" until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Give it all you've got. We're with you no matter what.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When your vanguard’s attack hits, you may return this unit to your hand.
flavorTextEN: A thunderclap sword blade that no one can grab ahold of.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), if your (VC) has one Arms, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose an Arms card from your hand or drop, and Arm it to one of your vanguards.
[CONT](RC):During your turn, if your (VC) has two or more Arms, this unit gets [Power]+5000.
flavorTextEN: Grab hold of unforgiven thoughts with those hands

effectEN: If your vanguard is "Dragonic Overlord", choose one of your units, and it gets [Power]+20000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: That's an old legend of destroying a great number of troops.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):At the end of the battle this unit attacked, COST  [put this unit into your soul], choose one of your rear-guards, and it gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
[AUTO](VC):At the beginning of your ride phase, you get "All of your front row units get [Power]+5000." until end of turn.
[AUTO](VC):When this unit attacks, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], and perform one of the following.
• Choose a card from your soul, and call it to (RC).
• Choose a card with "Ririmi" in its card name from your soul and a card with "Rarami" in its card name from your soul, and call them to (RC).
[Glitter](This card is a [Glitter] which seeks the Fire Regalis)
flavorTextEN:
The night when the blue moon shines...
Let us begin the march of the hundred demons.

effectEN:
[CONT](VC):During your turn, if your soul has a "Dragonic Overlord", this unit's drive cannot decrease from card effects, and it gets [Power]+5000.
[AUTO](VC)1/Turn :At the end of the battle that this unit attacked, COST  [Counter Blast (1) & discard two cards from your hand], [Stand] this unit, and it gets drive-1 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Carve in the memories of people, this is the brave figure of the dragon that burns life.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit's attack hits, if you have a unit in the [OverDress] state, draw a card.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):At the end of the battle this unit attacked, COST  [put this unit into your soul], choose one of your rear-guards, and it gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: The penetration power of this drill is immeasurable when mana flows through the engine.

effectEN:
[ACT](VC)1/Turn :COST  [Discard a card from hand], choose up to one "Trickstar" and up to one <Prayer Dragon> unit from your drop, and call them to (RC).
[AUTO](VC):When this unit attacks, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose one of your rear-guards in the [X-overDress] state, and [Stand] it.
flavorTextEN: While harboring thoughts of the moon, the sun shines upon the new future.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks a vanguard, this unit gets [Power]+2000 until end of that battle for each of your opponent's open (RC).
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit's attack hits, if you have a unit in the [OverDress] state, draw a card.
flavorTextEN: How about you have a taste of this next?

effectEN: Choose one of your units with "Nirvana" in its card name, and it gets [Power]+20000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
[X-overDress]-One "Trickstar" and one <Prayer Dragon> unit (You may place it by stacking it on all of the specified units instead of normal calling it to (RC))
[CONT](RC):During your turn, if this unit is in the [X-overDress] state, this unit gets [Power]+10000, and if your opponent's vanguard is grade 3 or greater, it gets [Power]+10000.
[AUTO](RC)1/Turn :When this unit's attack hits a vanguard, if this unit is in the [X-overDress] state, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], choose one of your columns, and retire all of your opponent's rear-guards in that column.
flavorTextEN: The will to push through thousands of trials. An appearance befitting of it.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), if you have a rear-guard with two or more originalDress, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], choose one of your opponent's rear-guards, and retire it.
flavorTextEN: See your noble prayers through until the end.

effectEN:
[X-overDress]-One "Trickstar" and one <Prayer Dragon> unit (You may place it by stacking it on all of the specified units instead of normal calling it to (RC))
[ACT](RC):If this unit is in the [X-overDress] state, COST  [Soul Blast (2)], choose one of your opponent's rear-guards, and retire it.
[AUTO](RC):When this unit in the [X-overDress] state attacks a vanguard, this unit gets [Power]+2000 until end of that battle for each of your opponent's open (RC). Then, if your opponent has one or less rear-guards, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], until end of that battle, this unit gets drive -1, and this unit performs drive checks.
flavorTextEN: For the purpose of protecting the many shining possibilities and the sparkling future―.

effectEN: [CONT](RC):During your turn, this unit gets [Power]+10000, and if your opponent has a front row rear-guard, this unit cannot attack a vanguard.
flavorTextEN: Obliterate everything by means of overwhelming firepower.

nameEN: Fierce Bullet of Dust Storm, Nawfal
effectEN: [ACT](RC):If you have a vanguard with "Eugene" in its card name, COST  [bind this unit], choose up to two normal units from your drop other than sentinels, and put them into your soul. If your opponent's rear-guard was retired this turn, you may put all of the chosen cards on the top of your deck in any order instead of into your soul.
flavorTextEN: I've loaded the bullet. I'll count on you for the timing to shoot, okay?

nameEN: Striking Artillery of Dust Storm, Andrea
effectEN: [ACT](RC):If you have a vanguard with "Eugene" in its card name, COST  [retire this unit], choose one of your opponent's rear-guards, and retire it.
flavorTextEN: Make sure that preparations are properly done. Aim for the big one. Focus on that single point.

effectEN:
[X-overDress]-One "Trickstar" and one <Prayer Dragon> unit (You may place it by stacking it on all of the specified units instead of normal calling it to (RC))
[ACT](RC):If this unit is in the [X-overDress] state, COST  [Soul Blast (2)], choose one of your opponent's rear-guards, and retire it.
[AUTO](RC):When this unit in the [X-overDress] state attacks a vanguard, this unit gets [Power]+2000 until end of that battle for each of your opponent's open (RC). Then, if your opponent has one or less rear-guards, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], until end of that battle, this unit gets drive -1, and this unit performs drive checks.
flavorTextEN: In order to protect the bright future among the many brilliant possibilities......

effectEN: Choose one of your units with "Nirvana" in its card name, and it gets [Power]+20000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: The holy flame and the sealed blaze. The combined flames became an amazing force.

effectEN:
Play this card with COST  [Soul Blast (2)] if you have a vanguard with "Tamayura" in its card name!
Choose up to one unit card with "Ririmi " in its card name and up to one unit card with "Rarami " in its card name each from your drop, and call them to (RC).
flavorTextEN: The ring spun by life will purify all evil.

effectEN:
[AUTO](RC):At the beginning of your main phase, if you do not have a Momokke token on your (RC), call up to one Momokke token to (RC).
[Glitter]-"Rorowa" (Active if your vanguard is a [Glitter] with "Rorowa" in its card name)
[AUTO](Hand):At the end of the battle your rear-guard with "Radylina" in its card name attacked, if your opponent's vanguard is grade 3 or greater, COST  [retire a rear-guard with "Radylina" in its card name and a Momokke token], call this card to (RC), and increase that unit's [Power] by the [Power] of the Momokke token retired for the cost of this ability until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: The strength is to never doubt yourself!

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks a vanguard, this unit gets [Power]+2000 until end of that battle for each of your opponent's open (RC).
flavorTextEN: Only one enemy shadow remaining. And all that is left is to pierce through with this spear.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC) by your card's ability, if you have a vanguard with "Tamayura" or "Shojodoji" in its card name, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], and draw a card.
[CONT](RC):If two or more of your cards were put from (RC) into your soul this turn, this unit gets [Power]+10000.
flavorTextEN: Should you wish for it, I'd make even the rogues of hell bend over!

effectEN:
[ACT](VC)1/Turn :COST  [Bind two cards with "Stealth" in their card names from soul], choose two of your opponent's (RC), bind all of the cards on the chosen (RC), and your opponent puts those cards into their hand at the end of that turn.
[AUTO](VC):When this unit attacks a vanguard, COST  [Counter Blast (1) & put two rear-guards into your soul], choose a card with "Stealth" in its card name from your bind zone, call it to (RC), and if your opponent's vanguard is grade 3 or greater, that called unit gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: I'll let you know since you don't, I am the great invincible Shojodoji!

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], your opponent chooses three cards from their drop, and binds them. If three cards were not bound, this unit gets [Power]+10000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: To not leave any dust. That is his style.

effectEN:
Play this if you have a vanguard with "Shojodoji" in its card name!
You and your opponent each choose one of your own (RC), bind all of the cards on the chosen (RC), and at the end of that turn, each player puts the cards bound with this effect into their hand. If you and your opponent each bound a card with this effect, put this card into your soul.
flavorTextEN: The rain will fall. The rain of the annihilation of demons.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), if your vanguard is [Glitter], Soul Charge (1), this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Clear the way to the future you wish for with this soulful strike.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit's attack hits a grade 3 or greater vanguard, choose two of your opponent's rear-guards, and retire them.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
[AUTO](RC):At the beginning of your main phase, if you do not have a Momokke token on your (RC), call up to one Momokke token to (RC).
[Glitter]-"Rorowa" (Active if your vanguard is a [Glitter] with "Rorowa" in its card name)
[AUTO](Hand):At the end of the battle your rear-guard with "Radylina" in its card name attacked, if your opponent's vanguard is grade 3 or greater, COST  [retire a rear-guard with "Radylina" in its card name and a Momokke token], call this card to (RC), and that unit's [Power] increases by the [Power] of the Momokke token retired for this ability's cost until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Strength is to never doubt yourself!

nameEN: Hunting Artillery of Dust Storm, Firas
effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), if you have a vanguard with "Eugene" in its card name, COST  [Counter Blast (1) & discard a card from hand], search your deck for up to one grade 3 normal order without [Regalis Piece], reveal it and put it into your hand, and shuffle your deck.
[AUTO](RC)1/Turn :When your opponent's rear-guard is retired by your card's ability during your main phase, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], [Stand] this unit, and this unit gets "Boost" until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Now―― Enjoy enjoy, shall we start the hunt?

effectEN: [CONT](Drop):If you have a vanguard with "Bavsargra" in its card name, this card is regarded as grade 1.
flavorTextEN: The one who broke the seal on me..... Was it you?

effectEN:
Play this if you have a vanguard with "Nirvana" in its card name, and one or more units each in the [overDress] state and the [X-overDress] state!
Choose one of your units in the [overDress] state, it gets "[AUTO](RC)1/Turn :When your vanguard attacks, [Stand] this unit." until end of turn, choose one of your units in the [X-overDress] state, and it gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: The overlapping brilliance is the light of prayer. The miracle spun by a guiding wish.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this card is discarded from hand during your turn, if you have a vanguard with "Nirvana" in its card name, COST  [Counter Blast (1) & Soul Blast (1)], choose a card with "Vairina" in its card name from your drop, and put it into your hand.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
[ACT](VC)1/Turn :COST  [Bind one or more cards from soul], and until end of turn, this unit gets "[CONT](VC):This unit gets the card names of all face up grade 1 or greater cards in your bind zone with "Stealth" in their card names.".
[ACT](VC)1/Turn :COST  [Counter Blast (1) & Put two rear-guards into soul], search your deck for up to two cards with the same card names as this unit, call them to (RC), and they get [Power]+5000 until end of turn. Shuffle your deck.
[CONT](VC):If your opponent's vanguard is grade 3 or greater, all of your rear-guards with the same card name as this unit and "Stealth" in their card names can attack from the back row.
flavorTextEN: This is a giant monster snake that feeds on the dreams of living things and distorts reality.

effectEN: [CONT](RC):During your turn, this unit gets [Power]+10000, and if your opponent has a front row rear-guard, this unit cannot attack a vanguard.
flavorTextEN: Obliterate everything by means of overwhelming firepower.

nameEN: Strike Cannon of Dust Storm, Andrea
effectEN: [ACT](RC):If you have a vanguard with "Eugene" in its card name, COST  [retire this unit], choose one of your opponent's rear-guards, and retire it.
flavorTextEN: Make sure that preparations are properly done. Aim for the big one. Focus on that single point.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks, if you have a unit in the [X-overDress] state, this unit gets [Power]+10000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
Play this if you have a vanguard with "Shojodoji" in its card name!
You and your opponent each choose one of your own (RC), bind all of the cards on the chosen (RC), and at the end of that turn, each player puts the cards bound with this effect into their hand. If you and your opponent each bound a card with this effect, put this card into your soul.
flavorTextEN: The rain will fall. The rain of the annihilation of demons.

effectEN: [CONT](RC):During your turn, if this unit is on a (RC) with a Dragontree marker, this unit gets [Power]+10000.
flavorTextEN: So long as my thirst will be satisfied, I care not what it takes.

effectEN:
[AUTO](VC):When your opponent's rear-guard is retired during your turn, choose a card from your drop, and you may bind it face down.
[CONT](VC):During your turn, all of your front row units get [Power]+2000 for each face down card in your bind zone. If your bind zone has five or more face down cards, this unit gets [Critical]+1.
[ACT](VC)1/Turn :COST  [Counter Blast (1)], and choose five of your opponent's rear-guards with different grades. Reveal the top five cards of your deck, retire all of the chosen units with the same grades as any of the revealed cards, shuffle your deck, and if you retired one or less units, draw a card, choose a card from your drop, and bind it face down.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), if you have a vanguard with "Gandiva" in its card name, COST  [Soul Blast (1) & bind another rear-guard face down], choose one of your opponent's rear-guards, and retire it. If you did not retire, draw a card, choose a card from your drop, and bind it face down.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], your opponent chooses three cards from their drop, and binds them. If three cards were not bound, this unit gets [Power]+10000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: To not leave any dust. That is his style.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this card is discarded from hand during your turn, if you have a vanguard with "Nirvana" in its card name, COST  [Counter Blast (1) & Soul Blast (1)], choose a card with "Vairina" in its card name from your drop, and put it into your hand.
flavorTextEN: I just...wanted to see what lies beyond this rift.

effectEN: All of this card's abilities are currently unknown.

Play this with COST  [Counter Blast (1)]!
Choose a column, and retire all of your opponent's rear-guards in that column.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

nameEN: Fighting Flame Dragon, Red Exard Dragon
effectEN:
[CONT](RC/GC):If your opponent's drive check or damage check revealed a trigger unit this turn, this unit gets [Power]+10000/[Shield]+10000.
[AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks a vanguard, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], and perform all of the following.
•Choose one of your opponent's rear-guards, and retire it. If you did not retire a card, draw a card.
•COST  [Remove a [Over] trigger from drop], and this unit gets [Power]+15000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: To live is to fight. Keep burning the blaze of your life.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks, if you have a unit in the [X-overDress] state, this unit gets [Power]+10000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
[overDress]-"Trickstar"
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), if it is [overDress], put all "Trickstar" and cards with the [overDress] ability from your drop as this unit's originalDress.
[AUTO](RC)1/Turn :When your vanguard attacks, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], [Stand] this unit, and this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn for each of this unit's originalDress.
flavorTextEN: To now fulfill the wish that contains our prayers―

effectEN:
[CONT](VC):During your turn, if you have a unit in the [overDress] state, all of your front row units get [Power]+10000.
[ACT](VC)1/Turn :COST  [Counter Blast (1) & Put a card with "Nirvana" in its card name from your hand or soul into your drop], choose a grade 0 card from your drop, call it to (RC), choose one of your opponent's vanguards, and if your opponent's damage zone has four or less cards, deal one damage.
flavorTextEN: The prayers reach the heaven, and the world selects the future.

effectEN: [CONT](GC):If your opponent's vanguard is grade 3 or greater, this unit gets [Shield]+5000.
flavorTextEN: IN tough times, the heroic timbre supports the heart.

effectEN: (You may only have up to four cards with "HEAL" in a deck.)
flavorTextEN: The Keter Engine is said to be completed by the magi.
For the sakes of the oppressed citizens, the golden knight heads to the frontlines.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is rode upon, if you went second, draw a card.
flavorTextEN: The resurrected image depicts the fierce battle between the apocalypse and the abyss.

effectEN: (You may only have up to four [Heal] triggers in a deck. When revealed as a trigger, choose one of your units, and it gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn! Then, if the number of cards in your damage zone is equal to or more than your opponent's, choose a card from your damage zone, and heal it!)
flavorTextEN: Your shedding of blood is what is wrong.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is rode upon, if you went second, draw a card.
flavorTextEN: The celestials believe themselves to be the chosen ones.

effectEN: (When revealed as a trigger, choose one of your units, and it gets [Critical]+1 until end of turn! Then, choose one of your units, and it gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn.)
flavorTextEN: The sin of disrupting order is heavy. No need for excessive considerations.

effectEN: (When revealed as a trigger, draw a card! Then, choose one of your units, and it gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn!)
flavorTextEN: The divide between the heavens and the earth is deeper than one can imagine.

effectEN: (When revealed as a trigger, all of your front row units get [Power]+10000 until end of turn!)
flavorTextEN: By experiencing an era without prayers, the world is born anew.

nameEN: Light Dragon Deity of Honors, Amartinoa
effectEN:
(You may only have one [Over] trigger in a deck. When revealed as a trigger, remove that card, draw a card, choose one of your units, and it gets [Power]+100 Million until end of turn! If revealed during drive check, activate its additional effect!)
Additional Effect - Until end of turn, you also perform drive checks for the battles your rear-guards attack!
flavorTextEN: Rouse yourself with courage. Everyone has the capability to be a hero.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is rode upon, if you went second, draw a card.
flavorTextEN: If it is us, we can surely build a bright future.
Its impossible, you say? Who are you to determine that?
And now, which one shall go first~?

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):At the end of the battle this unit boosted, COST  [put this unit into your soul], choose one of your units, and it gets [Power]+2000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: These wings are not just for flying......

effectEN: [CONT](GC):If your opponent's vanguard is grade 3 or greater, this unit gets [Shield]+5000.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [CONT](GC):If your opponent's vanguard is grade 3 or greater, this unit gets [Shield]+5000.
flavorTextEN: I see. Let's make it a little firmer here.

effectEN: Additional Effect - Choose one of your units, and it gets [Power]+100 Million until end of turn!
[AUTO]:When this unit is rode upon, if you went second, draw a card.
flavorTextEN: Our power of purity will bring peace to the world.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is put on (GC), if your opponent's attacking unit has attacked two or more times this turn, this unit gets [Shield]+15000 until end of that battle. (Active if this battle is its second attack this turn or more)
flavorTextEN: The breath of life within me burns brightly against adversity.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is rode upon, if you went second, draw a card.
flavorTextEN: He knows the values of courage, and believes in it until the end.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is put on (GC), if the attacking unit's [Critical] is 2 or greater, and its [Critical] is increased by a non-trigger effect ability or its original [Critical] is 2 or greater, this unit gets [Shield]+15000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: Wrap your pains in tears and forget them!

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is rode upon, if you went second, draw a card.
flavorTextEN: It is his dream to stand alongside the proud knight that is his father.

effectEN: (When revealed as a trigger, choose one of your units, and it gets [Critical]+1 until end of turn! Then, choose one of your units, and it gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn!)
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: (When revealed as a trigger, draw a card! Then, choose one of your units, and it gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn!)
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: (When revealed as a trigger, all of your front row units get [Power]+10000 until end of turn!)
flavorTextEN: Now is the time to boldly attack. Let's go!

effectEN: (You may only have up to four [Heal] triggers in a deck. When revealed as a trigger, choose one of your units, and it gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn! Then, if the number of cards in your damage zone is equal to or more than your opponent's, choose a card from your damage zone, and heal it!)
flavorTextEN: This secret medicine can cure all injuries!

effectEN: (You may only have up to four cards with "HEAL" in a deck.)
flavorTextEN: The droplets of life, be careful not to spill any more of it.
Charge in mercilessly, and trample over everything.
Backup supplies are on the way. Survive until then.

nameEN: True Arbiter Dragon of Hundred Swords, Duralvalse
effectEN: Additional Effect - Until end of turn, you also perform drive checks for the battles your rear-guards attack!
(When revealed as a trigger, choose one of your units, and it gets [Critical]+1 until end of turn! Then, choose one of your units, and it gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn!)
flavorTextEN: Let me bestow thee with the power to carry out thy will.

effectEN: (When revealed as a trigger, draw a card! Then, choose one of your units, and it gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn!)
flavorTextEN: Wield your claws bravely and speed forth.
Let us be off, gloriously!

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is rode upon, if you went second, draw a card.
flavorTextEN: The 《Genesis》 Conglomerate was once established to reverse divinations of the hopeless future.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is put on (GC), if your vanguard's grade is less than your opponent's vanguard's grade, this unit gets [Shield]+10000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is rode upon, if you went second, draw a card.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is rode upon, if you went second, draw a card.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

[CONT]:This card is also regarded as "Blade Feather Dragon".
